scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @codex-web/server && concurrently -c auto -n server,web "npm run start -w @codex-web/server" "npm run dev -w @codex-web/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @codex-web/server && npm run build -w @codex-web/web
scripts.pack:desktop: npm run build && npm run pack -w @codex-web/desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run dist:win -w @codex-web/desktop
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run dist:mac -w @codex-web/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @codex-web/server && npm run lint -w @codex-web/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w @codex-web/server && npm run typecheck -w @codex-web/web && npm run typecheck -w @codex-web/desktop
